tweets:
⚠️ Your $15K/month SEO budget is now invisible to 47% of your market.

Here's the math and what to do 👇

1/ The old reality:

$15K/month on SEO
→ Ranking on page 1
→ 10,000+ monthly visits
→ 200+ leads
→ $50K+ value

This worked in 2020.

2/ The new reality (2026):

$15K/month on SEO
→ Ranking on page 1... for WHO?

47% of patients now use:
• ChatGPT
• Perplexity
• Google SGE
• Claude

These don't show 'page 1 rankings.' They cite 2-3 sources.

3/ The math:

Traditional SEO: $15K/mo = visible to 53% of market
GEO implementation: $50K one-time = visible to 95%+

One-time cost. Compound returns.

Your SEO budget is literally half-effective.

4/ But here's the thing:

You don't need to choose.

You need to DIVERSIFY.

Current allocation:
• Traditional SEO: 70%
• Paid ads: 20%
• GEO: 0% (if you're like most)

Target allocation:
• Traditional SEO: 40%
• Paid ads: 15%
• GEO: 45%

5/ Why GEO works:

1-time implementation cost
+ Minimal ongoing maintenance
+ Compound returns (more citations over time)
+ Works across ALL AI platforms
+ Not affected by algorithm updates

vs SEO: constant work, constant updates, constant fees

6/ The transition:

Month 1-2: Keep SEO running, start GEO implementation
Month 3-4: Measure AI visibility improvements
Month 5-6: Reduce SEO spend as GEO picks up
Month 7+: GEO as primary, SEO as supplement

You don't have to kill SEO. Just stop over-investing.

7/ Ready to diversify?

→ Check your current AI visibility
→ See what competitors are capturing
→ Get a GEO roadmap

Reply 'ROADMAP' and I'll send you a custom plan for your practice.
